{{ rqst_param.store_name }} @if (!ui_controls.is_loading){

Latest

@for(best_seller of latest; track best_seller.product_id){

{{best_seller.product_name}} -

{{best_seller.price}}
}
}
@for(category of categories; track category.id){

{{category.name}}

@for(product of products; track product.product_id){ @if(category.id == product.collection){

{{product.product_name}} -

{{product.price}}
} }
}
@if (ui_controls.is_loading){ }
